details.test: Task 1: Book wedding venue with constraints
Task 2: Reserve 2-night stay with breakfast under budget and go to payment
Task 3: Book cheapest venue package with projector, Wi-Fi, coffee break and add to cart
Task 4: Choose cheaper of two queen rooms with free cancellation and start booking
Task 5: Block 5 rooms and add airport shuttle extra
Task 6: Reserve cheapest 3-hour meeting room with video conferencing and whiteboard
Task 7: Customize wedding package for 80 guests within $4,800 and save
Task 8: Apply SAVE20 promo to midweek stay and proceed to payment
Task 9: Save three top-rated retreat venues within 120 miles of Denver to favorites
